title: Shabaash Mithu
overview: From child prodigy to trailblazing captain, Indian women's cricket icon Mithali Raj navigates highs and lows of professional career. A story of a young girl's determination and stance against discrimination, about her spirit, passion, courage, and her dreams.

trailers.title: Shabaash Mithu | Official Trailer | Taapsee Pannu | Srijit Mukherji | In Cinemas 15th July
